description: Every SEC filing, every XBRL fact, every insider trade — synced into a local SQLite store you can pivot, search, and watch offline.
auth_description: The SEC requires a User-Agent header with a name and contact email on every request to data.sec.gov and www.sec.gov. There is no API key. Set SEC_EDGAR_USER_AGENT='Your Name your@email.com' and the CLI will send it on every call.

novel_features.name: Coverage-list 8-K item pivot
novel_features.description: Across a saved watchlist of CIKs, surface 8-Ks filed in the window grouped by Item code (2.05 restructuring, 5.02 exec change, 4.02 non-reliance).

novel_features.name: Insider cluster detector
novel_features.description: Flag issuers where 3+ distinct insiders filed Form 4 with the same transaction code (open-market buy or sale) within a rolling N-day window.

novel_features.name: Live filing watch with filters
novel_features.description: Stream the SEC Atom getcurrent feed with multi-dimensional filtering: form type, 8-K item, CIK watchlist, and keyword regex. Emits one NDJSON line per match.

novel_features.name: XBRL peer-group bench
novel_features.description: Take an XBRL concept for one reporting period, group by SIC code, and emit percentile statistics (p10/p50/p90) across every public-company filer in that SIC.

novel_features.name: Cross-section concept across companies
novel_features.description: Pivot a single XBRL concept across an explicit company list and the last N reporting periods. Output as a wide pivot table (one row per company, one column per period).

novel_features.name: Restatement / non-reliance scanner
novel_features.description: Surface 8-K Item 4.02 (non-reliance on prior financials) plus all 10-K/A and 10-Q/A amendments filed in the window — the textbook accounting-irregularity signal.

novel_features.name: Late filer scanner
novel_features.description: Find issuers that filed an NT 10-K, NT 10-Q, or NT 20-F in the window — the SEC's 'I'm going to miss my reporting deadline' notification.

novel_features.name: 13F holdings delta
novel_features.description: Diff an institutional investor's 13F holdings across two consecutive quarters. Categorize each issuer as ADD / EXIT / INCREASE / DECREASE with share-count delta.

novel_features.name: Beneficial-ownership section extraction
novel_features.description: Resolve a ticker, name, or CIK, find the latest DEF 14A proxy, fetch the document, and extract the "Security Ownership of Certain Beneficial Owners" section as readable text.
